mapper.select:
select p.id as playlistId, p.title as title, p.style as style, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.introduction as introduction, p.play_count as playCount, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_time as updateTime, p.user_id as userId,
(select count(*) from tb_user_favorite uf where uf.playlist_id = p.id) as likeCount,
(select count(*) from tb_comment c where c.playlist_id = p.id) as commentCount from tb_playlist p left join tb_user u on p.user_id = u.id
and p.id=#{dto.playlistId}
and p.title like concat('%',#{dto.title},'%')
and p.style like concat('%',#{dto.style},'%')
and p.user_id = #{dto.userId}

SELECT p.id AS playlistId, p.title AS title, p.style AS style, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.introduction AS introduction, p.user_id AS userId, p.play_count AS playCount, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, u.username AS username, p.like_count AS likeCount FROM tb_user_favorite uf INNER JOIN tb_playlist p ON uf.playlist_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.type = 1 ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC

select p.id as id, p.title as title, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.play_count as playCount, (select count(*) from tb_playlist_song pl where pl.playlist_id = p.id) as songCount from tb_playlist p where p.user_id = #{userId} order by p.play_count desc
